scenarios.title: First retired-command invocation shows one notice and serves the intent
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: integration/e2e rows must observe notice plus NL-served primary response

scenarios.title: Second invocation of the same retired command does not re-notify
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: integration row must prove server ledger suppresses duplicate notice

scenarios.title: Different retired command produces its own one-time notice
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: integration row must prove per-command notice independence

scenarios.title: Residual telemetry counts invocations per command per user bucket
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: integration/e2e rows must query real residual metrics/report data

scenarios.title: Rollback threshold pauses the window automatically
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: integration/e2e rows must prove alert and paused state behavior

scenarios.title: Resuming the window resets the consecutive-day counter
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: integration row must prove counter reset and telemetry continuity

scenarios.title: Window-closed response is the canonical unknown-command response
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: e2e-api row must prove no legacy handler invocation

scenarios.title: Post-window observation confirms zero legacy handler invocations
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: integration/report rows must prove zero invocation before deletion eligibility

scenarios.title: Dedup ledger survives across sessions and devices
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: e2e-api row must drive at least two transports for same user

scenarios.title: Missing SST keys fail loud
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: unit/integration rows prove missing config blocks window open

scenarios.title: Telemetry contains no raw user identifiers
scenarios.liveSystemExpectation: unit/e2e rows prove HMAC bucket and no raw text/id labels
